caption:
live the life you love, love the life you live ✨🚞⛴️🚁🌎✨ #2024recap recorded with @insta360 @insta360mysg #insta360X4 #teaminsta360 

📍Sri Lanka 🇱🇰 Brisbane Australia 🇦🇺 Singapore 🇸🇬 Japan 🇯🇵 Iran 🇮🇷 China 🇨🇳 Alaska 🇺🇸 Korea 🇰🇷Istanbul Turkey 🇹🇷 Bintan Indonesia 🇮🇩 Saudi Arabia 🇸🇦 Phuket Thailand 🇹🇭 are featured in the reel 

📍many things had happened in 2024, went to some amazing countries met amazing people won @destination_srilanka Tourism special recognition award 🏆 & HOFS award 🏆 had a freak accident 🤕 fell on the back of my head & had four stitches 🧵 no matter the ups & down in life 🧡

be yourself not letting others define you or make decisions for you 

🎞️ @dotzsoh @dotzsoh2 
#insta360mysg #insta360 #dotzsoh #travelblogger
